title: Optibye
description: Stops Optifine from logging certain messages that are deemed as not useful.
body:
Stops Optifine from logging certain messages that are deemed as not useful.

These are the messages that it can remove if it starts with the following:
```
CustomItems:
NaturalTextures:
ConnectedTextures:
CustomSky properties:
CustomColors:
```

**This mod will not be updated and is just as is and was made because I got annoyed with log spam**
